articles.title: 8% of Solana’s Supply is With FTX? Can SOL Price Dip?
articles.description: A recent disclosure by a former FTX employee has sent shockwaves through the crypto community. A whistleblower has reportedly disclosed a startling revelation about FTX and Solana. The now-bankrupt FTX exchange holds a substantial 8% stake in the total supply of Solana (SOL). SOL, as we are aware is the fifth-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. This […]
